location.description: PostgreSQL connection URI: postgres://[user[:password]@]host[:port][/database]. If a database path is included, only that database is backed up; otherwise all databases are backed up.

host.description: PostgreSQL server hostname (default: localhost). Overrides the host in the location URI.

port.description: PostgreSQL server port (default: 5432). Overrides the port in the location URI.

username.description: PostgreSQL username. Overrides the username in the location URI.

password.description: PostgreSQL password. Overrides the password in the location URI.

database.description: Name of the database to back up using pg_dump. If omitted, all databases are backed up using pg_dumpall. Overrides the database in the location URI.

schema_only.description: When true, passes -s to pg_dump/pg_dumpall to dump only schema (no data). Mutually exclusive with data_only.

data_only.description: When true, passes -a to pg_dump/pg_dumpall to dump only data (no schema). Mutually exclusive with schema_only.

pg_bin_dir.description: Directory containing the PostgreSQL client binaries (pg_dump, pg_dumpall, psql). When omitted, binaries are resolved via $PATH.

compress.description: Enable pg_dump compression (default: false). By default dumps are uncompressed so that Plakar's own compression is not degraded.

ssl_mode.description: SSL mode for the connection, passed via PGSSLMODE (default: prefer).

ssl_cert.description: Path to the client SSL certificate file (PEM format), passed via PGSSLCERT.

ssl_key.description: Path to the client SSL private key file (PEM format), passed via PGSSLKEY.

ssl_root_cert.description: Path to the root CA certificate used to verify the server (PEM format), passed via PGSSLROOTCERT.
